compose_diagnostics.page_title: RT on X: "Five Eyes (US, UK, CA, AU, NZ) intelligence alliance warns AI cyberattacks are 'imminent' — time measured in MONTHS They urge leaders to treat cyber risk as a 'core business risk and leadership responsibility' Meanwhile, CISA lost a third of its staff, left passwords exposed https://t.co/JzhZNrKygL" / X
compose_diagnostics.compose_text_preview: Five Eyes warns of "imminent" AI cyberattacks. Meanwhile, CISA lost staff and exposed passwords. The disconnect between official warnings and actual preparedness is stark. It makes you question the effectiveness of global governance.
